Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\({path:'e:/engineering/test/smart-question-bank/server/.env'}\); const mysql=require\('mysql2/promise'\); \(async\(\)=>{const pool=mysql.createPool\({host:process.env.DB_HOST||'localhost',port:Number\(process.env.DB_PORT||3306\),user:process.env.DB_USER||'root',password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD||'root',database:process.env.DB_NAME||'smart_question_bank',charset:'utf8mb4'}\); const [rows]=await pool.query\(\\"SELECT id, username, email, created_at FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5\\"\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows,null,2\)\); await pool.end\(\);}\)\(\).catch\(err=>{console.error\(err\); process.exit\(1\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\({path:'e:/engineering/test/smart-question-bank/server/.env'}\); const mysql=require\('mysql2/promise'\); \(async\(\)=>{const pool=mysql.createPool\({host:process.env.DB_HOST||'localhost',port:Number\(process.env.DB_PORT||3306\),user:process.env.DB_USER||'root',password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD||'root',database:process.env.DB_NAME||'smart_question_bank',charset:'utf8mb4'}\); const [rows]=await pool.query\(\\"SHOW CREATE TABLE user_sessions\\"\); console.log\(rows[0]['Create Table']\); await pool.end\(\);}\)\(\).catch\(err=>{console.error\(err\); process.exit\(1\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('e:/engineering/test/smart-question-bank/server/node_modules/dotenv'\).config\({path:'e:/engineering/test/smart-question-bank/server/.env'}\); const mysql=require\('e:/engineering/test/smart-question-bank/server/node_modules/mysql2/promise'\); \(async\(\)=>{const pool=mysql.createPool\({host:process.env.DB_HOST||'localhost',port:Number\(process.env.DB_PORT||3306\),user:process.env.DB_USER||'root',password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD||'root',database:process.env.DB_NAME||'smart_question_bank',charset:'utf8mb4'}\); const [rows]=await pool.query\(\\"SELECT id, user_id, created_at, updated_at FROM user_stats ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10\\"\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows,null,2\)\); await pool.end\(\);}\)\(\).catch\(err=>{console.error\(err\); process.exit\(1\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('e:/engineering/test/smart-question-bank/server/node_modules/dotenv'\).config\({path:'e:/engineering/test/smart-question-bank/server/.env'}\); const mysql=require\('e:/engineering/test/smart-question-bank/server/node_modules/mysql2/promise'\); const jwt=require\('e:/engineering/test/smart-question-bank/server/node_modules/jsonwebtoken'\); const {v4:uuidv4}=require\('e:/engineering/test/smart-question-bank/server/node_modules/uuid'\); \(async\(\)=>{const pool=mysql.createPool\({host:process.env.DB_HOST||'localhost',port:Number\(process.env.DB_PORT||3306\),user:process.env.DB_USER||'root',password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD||'root',database:process.env.DB_NAME||'smart_question_bank',charset:'utf8mb4'}\); const [users]=await pool.query\(\\"SELECT id, username, role FROM users WHERE username='debug_1776601056'\\"\); const user=users[0]; console.log\('USER', user\); const accessToken=jwt.sign\({userId:user.id, username:user.username, role:user.role}, process.env.JWT_SECRET, {expiresIn:'15m'}\); const refreshToken=jwt.sign\({userId:user.id, type:'refresh'}, process.env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, {expiresIn:'7d'}\); console.log\('TOKENS_OK', !!accessToken, !!refreshToken\); const sessionId=uuidv4\(\); const now=Date.now\(\); const deviceInfo={deviceType:'desktop',browser:'curl',os:'unknown',deviceName:'unknown · curl'}; try { await pool.query\(\\"INSERT INTO user_sessions \(id, user_id, refresh_token, ip_address, device_info, expires_at, created_at\) VALUES \(?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?\)\\", [sessionId, user.id, '', '127.0.0.1', JSON.stringify\(deviceInfo\), now + 7*24*60*60*1000, now]\); console.log\('SESSION_INSERT_OK', sessionId\); } catch \(err\) { console.error\('SESSION_INSERT_ERR', err.message\); throw err; } try { await pool.query\(\\"UPDATE user_sessions SET refresh_token = ? WHERE id = ?\\", [refreshToken, sessionId]\); console.log\('SESSION_UPDATE_OK'\); } catch \(err\) { console.error\('SESSION_UPDATE_ERR', err.message\); throw err; } await pool.end\(\); }\)\(\).catch\(err=>{console.error\(err\); process.exit\(1\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('e:/engineering/test/smart-question-bank/server/node_modules/dotenv'\).config\({path:'e:/engineering/test/smart-question-bank/server/.env'}\); const mysql=require\('e:/engineering/test/smart-question-bank/server/node_modules/mysql2/promise'\); \(async\(\)=>{const pool=mysql.createPool\({host:process.env.DB_HOST||'localhost',port:Number\(process.env.DB_PORT||3306\),user:process.env.DB_USER||'root',password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD||'root',database:process.env.DB_NAME||'smart_question_bank',charset:'utf8mb4'}\); const [rows]=await pool.query\(\\"SELECT id, username, last_login_at, last_login_ip, login_count FROM users WHERE username='debug_1776601056'\\"\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows,null,2\)\); await pool.end\(\);}\)\(\).catch\(err=>{console.error\(err\); process.exit\(1\);}\);")
